stories.title: Iron Tempest
stories.description: A courier with a mechanical arm joins a rebel crew to protect the last sky city from an empire of war engines.
stories.author: Mika Arata

chapters.title: The Storm Gate
chapters.content: Rin races through the lower docks as imperial airships descend over the city. A stolen engine core points her toward a rebellion she never wanted to join.

chapters.title: Steel Oath
chapters.content: The crew tests Rin's loyalty in a rail-yard ambush. When her arm overloads, she discovers the core responds to her heartbeat.

chapters.title: Ashes Above Cloud Nine
chapters.content: A daring escape above the cloud belt reveals the empire's next target. Rin chooses the rebellion and marks herself as the fleet's most wanted courier.

stories.title: Lanterns Under Hollow Hill
stories.description: A village night watchman investigates lanterns that appear beneath a sealed shrine every new moon.
stories.author: Nao Kisaragi

chapters.title: The Bell Without a Rope
chapters.content: Sota hears the shrine bell ring from below the earth. The elders deny the sound, but every household leaves salt outside before dawn.

chapters.title: Names in Wax
chapters.content: Lanterns surface in the cemetery, each carved with the name of someone still alive. Sota finds his sister's name burning brightest.

chapters.title: The Hill Opens
chapters.content: The shrine stones split at midnight. Sota follows a procession underground and learns the village has been paying a debt for generations.

stories.title: Apricot Letters
stories.description: Two rival calligraphy students exchange anonymous letters while competing for the same academy scholarship.
stories.author: Eri Momose

chapters.title: Ink Before Sunrise
chapters.content: Hana arrives early to practice and finds a critique tucked beneath her brush case. The advice is sharp, honest, and strangely kind.

chapters.title: The Festival Stroke
chapters.content: A public exhibition forces Hana and Ren to work side by side. Their anonymous letters become bolder as their rivalry softens.

chapters.title: Apricots in the Rain
chapters.content: When the scholarship theme is announced, Hana recognizes Ren's handwriting in the letter she has carried all season.

stories.title: The Clockwork Alibi
stories.description: A young detective and a retired stage magician solve a locked-room murder inside a mansion of automated clocks.
stories.author: Junpei Mori

chapters.title: Thirteen Chimes
chapters.content: Detective Aya arrives as thirteen clocks strike at once and a financier is found dead in a room bolted from the inside.

chapters.title: The Magician's Ledger
chapters.content: Matsuda identifies a stage illusion hidden in the clockwork walls. Aya traces the victim's final appointment to a missing ledger.

chapters.title: A Minute Out of Place
chapters.content: A clock running sixty seconds late breaks the alibi. Aya gathers the suspects and reconstructs the impossible murder.
